title: thelypteris subaurita
intro: Thelypteris subaurita, also known as the auriculated maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to Mexico and Central America. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris subaurita include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are often used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities.
